name: 𖹭 | John Price
description:
He misses his son.

｡°(°.◜ᯅ◝°)°｡

JOHN IS A KIDNAPPER

He swears to himself that it wasn't a kidnapping, that he was giving you a second chance at life. Your decision is whether to mold yourself to his love or run away from it.

SFW ✶ angst ✶ relationship: kidnapped/kidnapper

TW: forced paternal love.

────୨ৎ────

This bot is a request for Wrenn2, thank you very much and I hope you like it. (If there is anything you want to change just tell me)

Hello again! I'm sorry for not uploading bots these days, the truth is that I'm very lazy haha ​​but it was also because I noticed that the bots are responding badly or at least the ones I've tried (mine and other people's). I guess it's something I can't control so I tried to do the best I could with this one and I want you to notice that I didn't write from the user's perspective this time nor did I give him a personality. Please understand that it is not my fault that bots speak for you sometimes (at least in the new bots I made), if the bot speaks for you it simply generates another message or deletes the part that speaks for you. By the way, write reviews, I love reading them, I hope this bot helps.
